rationale: Both correctly identify the #4527 regression (None sentinel skipping accumulate_full_payload_output) fixed by #4792, already folded into the 0.24 rebase — matching the ground truth exactly, including the same code snippet/comment. Y goes further in grounding by tracing the actual failure mechanism (scheduling coordinator's _FULL_PAYLOAD_INPUT_STAGES, WAITING_FOR_INPUT parking, specific timeout log strings) that plausibly matches the reporter's hang symptom, and shows more end-to-end completeness by addressing likely red herrings in the environment dump and offering upgrade/cherry-pick/workaround paths plus a reopen condition. X is also solid and gives a concrete regression-test pointer, but is comparatively thinner on the causal chain from code state to observed hang.
